headline: 189-year-old dividend stock offers 19% upside in March 2026
summary: Few companies on Wall Street can claim over 50 years of continuous dividend payments. Deere & Company, founded in 1837, is one of them. That kind of staying power reflects a business built to endure downturns, commodity cycles, and even tariff headwinds. And right now, Wall Street thinks the ...

headline: Trump Unveils New Loan Guarantees for Beleaguered Farmers
summary: (Bloomberg) -- President Donald Trump announced new loan guarantees for farmers and food suppliers, a bid to bolster US agricultural communities squeezed by the impact of the Iran war, tariffs and other challenges.Trump said the loan guarantees would cover farmers and food suppliers, including vegetable, grain and seed farmers, cattle, pig and poultry producers, as well as grocery wholesalers and others.
